name_en: 🎉Fluffy Hobo🎉 New arrival, imported cashmere 🎉🎉1BC204🎉 This Hobo bag uses imported cashmere, featuring a detachable fur shoulder strap and chain. It adds a touch of sexiness when worn as an underarm bag, and comes with a detachable long shoulder strap. If you like a sporty sexy style, you can crossbody carry it for a chic look. Highly functional. The best part is the small hanging charm on the strap. So beautiful 🎉🎉 A winter essential. If you love it, grab one now. Dimensions: 22L x 18H x 6W cm 🎉🎉🎉
